sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ الْأُسْرَةُ الرُّكْنَ الْأَسَاسِيَّ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Porodica predstavlja osnovni stub u arapskom društvu.
sentences.translationEn: The family represents the fundamental pillar in Arab society.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَرِمُ الصِّغَارُ الْكِبَارَ، وَيَهْتَمُّ الْآبَاءُ بِتَرْبِيَةِ أَبْنَائِهِمْ عَلَى الْأَخْلَاقِ الْحَمِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mlađi poštuju starije, a roditelji se brinu o odgoju svoje djece u skladu s lijepim moralom.
sentences.translationEn: The young respect the old, and parents care for raising their children with good morals.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ كُلَّ يَوْمِ جُمُعَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِ الْغَدَاءِ وَتَبَادُلِ الْأَحَادِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica se okuplja svakog petka na ručku i razgovoru.
sentences.translationEn: The family gathers every Friday to have lunch and exchange conversations.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الرَّوَابِطُ الْقَوِيَّةُ تَجْعَلُ الْفَرْدَ يَشْعُرُ بِالْأَمَانِ وَالدَّعْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ove snažne veze čine da se pojedinac osjeća sigurno i podržano.
sentences.translationEn: These strong bonds make the individual feel safe and supported.
